name: Classy Mustard-Garlic Mayonnaise Dip
recipeIngredient: Fresh Tarragon - chopped (or Dried Tarragon - crushed) - 1 teaspoon
Parsley - chopped (or Dried Parsley - crushed) - 1 teaspoon
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix until smooth and well combined.
3. Cover the mixture with plastic wrap.
4. Chill for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
5. Serve chilled as an accompaniment to shrimp, crabmeat, duck, Brussels sprouts, jicama, or radishes.
